areas.name: Common Infrastructure
areas.description: Contains utility and common functions used across multiple areas.

areas.name: Grain Management
areas.description: Handles the management of grain from procurement to delivery.

areas.description: Ensures the quality and safety standards for grains are met throughout the process.

areas.name: Logistics
